summary: Iteration 25: 6-feature batch testing - Sales Target Tracker, Floating Quick Entry, AI auto-categorization, Export Analytics PDF, AI Sales Forecast, Dashboard Today vs Yesterday. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - hydration issue from React rendering, but functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/targets creates sales target for branch/month (status 200)
Backend: POST /api/targets validates required fields (status 400 on missing)
Backend: GET /api/targets returns list of all targets
Backend: GET /api/targets/progress?month=2026-02 returns progress with 90.8% overall
Backend: Progress response has month, overall (target, actual, percentage), branches array
Backend: POST /api/expenses/auto-categorize returns 'general' for empty description
Backend: POST /api/expenses/auto-categorize suggests category for 'electricity bill'
Backend: POST /api/expenses/auto-categorize suggests category for 'rent payment'
Backend: POST /api/expenses/auto-categorize suggests category for 'staff salary'
Backend: GET /api/reports/analytics-pdf returns PDF file (content-type: application/pdf, %PDF header)
Backend: GET /api/reports/sales-forecast returns forecast with method, history, forecast array
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/today-vs-yesterday returns today, yesterday, change data
Frontend: Floating Quick Entry button visible on Dashboard (orange, links to /pos)
Frontend: Floating Quick Entry button hidden on /pos page (correct behavior)
Frontend: Floating Quick Entry button visible on Expenses page
Frontend: Dashboard stat cards show 'Today vs yesterday' comparison badges (tvy-sales, tvy-expenses, tvy-profit)
Frontend: Analytics page loads with title 'Analytics Dashboard'
Frontend: Analytics has Sales Target Tracker section with month selector
Frontend: Analytics shows Overall progress bar (90.8% width) and Test Branch progress (18.6%)
Frontend: Analytics has 'Set Target' button that opens dialog
Frontend: Set Target dialog has branch select, amount input, save button
Frontend: Analytics has 'PDF' export button in header
Frontend: PDF export downloads file 'ssc_analytics_report.pdf'
Frontend: Analytics has 'AI Sales Forecast' section with 'Generate Forecast' button
Frontend: Generate Forecast loads AI predictions with chart (Actual/Predicted lines)
Frontend: Forecast shows 'Method: AI-Powered (GPT-4o)' badge
Frontend: Forecast table shows 7-day predictions with Date, Predicted Sales, Confidence
Frontend: Expenses page has Description field with 'AI auto-cat' hint on blur
critical_code_review_comments: Sales Target Tracker: Uses /api/targets/progress with month param, calculates actual from sales vs target_amount
AI auto-categorize: Uses emergentintegrations with GPT-4o-mini to suggest expense category from description
PDF Export: Uses reportlab to generate PDF with Financial Summary, Branch Performance, Expense Categories tables
AI Sales Forecast: Uses GPT-4o-mini or falls back to moving average, returns 7-day predictions with confidence
Floating Quick Entry: Positioned fixed bottom-right with orange gradient, Zap icon from lucide-react, hidden on /pos
Today vs Yesterday: Endpoint compares today's date to yesterday, calculates percentage changes for sales/expenses/profit/count
Minor React warning about <tr> inside <span> in forecast table - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test target for 2026-03 with SAR 75,000. Existing target for branch 1, month 2026-02, SAR 50,000 showed 90.8% progress.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 complete. New features tested: 1) Sales Target Tracker at /analytics - shows overall and per-branch progress bars, Set Target dialog to create targets. 2) Floating Quick Entry button - orange Zap icon fixed bottom-right, visible on all pages EXCEPT /pos, links to /pos. 3) AI auto-categorize on Expenses page - typing description and blur triggers /api/expenses/auto-categorize, shows 'AI auto-cat' hint. 4) PDF Export on Analytics - downloads 'ssc_analytics_report.pdf' with Financial Summary, Branch Performance tables. 5) AI Sales Forecast - Generate Forecast button calls /api/reports/sales-forecast, shows chart with Actual (green) and Predicted (purple dashed) lines, table with 7-day predictions. 6) Dashboard tvy comparison - stat cards show '% vs yesterday' badges with color coding. Employee auto-creates user feature already existed (employees.py line 33-43) - not retested.
